description: Yuji, Megumi, and Nobara are sent to a detention center to investigate a Cursed Womb. They encounter a Special Grade Curse, leading to Yuji's temporary death.
The annual exchange event between the Tokyo and Kyoto Jujutsu High schools takes place, interrupted by an invasion of special grade curses led by Mahito.
The trio investigates a series of mysterious deaths connected to the Yasohachi Bridge, encountering the Death Painting Wombs Choso, Eso, and Kechizu.
A massive, coordinated attack by curses and curse users in Shibuya aimed at sealing Satoru Gojo. The event changes the jujutsu world forever.
A deadly battle royale orchestrated by Kenjaku, forcing sorcerers and awakened individuals to fight for points and survival.
